answers.question: Should the @spec annotation parser be a separate module or part of the existing spec_alignment module?
answers.answer: Part of spec_alignment as a submodule: spec_alignment/annotations.rs. Keeps it co-located with Phase 1 parser/rules.

answers.question: For Lens integration, should we call Lens at runtime or pre-index symbols?
answers.answer: Pre-index via sdd daemon. Depends on the daemon's symbol index for faster lookups. check-alignment queries the pre-built index rather than running Lens analysis from scratch each time.
